title: Analyzing and Encoding the Al-Mawrid Arabic-English Dictionary with the ISO Language Markup Framework and TEI Lex-0
abstract: arXiv:2606.18205v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: This paper presents a robust methodology for the systematic digitization and encoding of the Al-Mawrid Arabic-English dictionary, transforming it from a legacy print resource into a standardized computational lexicon. Addressing a significant gap in Arabic lexical infrastructure, the study adopts a dual-standard framing that aligns the ISO Lexical Markup Framework (LMF) with the Text Encoding Initiative TEI Lex-0 guidelines. By applying an editorial view to the dictionary's macro- and microstructure, the research resolves the structural ambiguities and punctuation inconsistencies typical of 20th-century bilingual dictionaries. The methodology is grounded in an empirical analysis of the dictionary's lexical knowledge density. Drawing on a representative sample (the letter Ayn, comprising 4.6% of the total volume), the study provides scientific weight to the encoding process, demonstrating a structural parsing accuracy of 91%. Quantita

translated_title: 基于ISO语言标记框架和TEI Lex-0标准分析与编码《Al-Mawrid阿拉伯语-英语词典》
translated_abstract: 摘要：本文提出了一种系统化的方法论，用于对《Al-Mawrid阿拉伯语-英语词典》进行数字化和编码，将其从传统的印刷资源转化为标准化的计算词汇库。针对阿拉伯语词汇基础设施中的重大空白，本研究采用了双重标准框架，将ISO词汇标记框架（LMF）与文本编码倡议TEI Lex-0指南相结合。通过从编辑视角分析词典的宏观和微观结构，研究解决了20世纪双语词典中常见的结构歧义和标点符号不一致问题。该方法基于对词典词汇知识密度的实证分析。基于代表性样本（字母Ayn，占总量的4.6%），研究为编码过程提供了科学依据，展示了91%的结构解析准确率。
tldr: 本文通过结合ISO LMF和TEI Lex-0双重标准，成功将《Al-Mawrid阿拉伯语-英语词典》数字化，并以91%的结构解析准确率解决了其结构歧义问题，填补了阿拉伯语词汇基础设施的空白。
en_tdlr: This paper digitizes the Al-Mawrid Arabic-English dictionary by integrating ISO LMF and TEI Lex-0 standards, achieving 91% structural parsing accuracy and resolving structural ambiguities, thereby filling a gap in Arabic lexical infrastructure.
